samples.text: All flying animals can fly through the air. Penguins are birds that do not fly. Therefore, can a penguin fly through the air?
Animals capable of aerial movement can travel through the air. Penguins are non-flying birds. Does this imply that penguins can fly through the air?
All airborne creatures are able to fly. Penguins are avians that cannot fly. Therefore, can a penguin fly?
Penguins belong to a category of birds that are unable to fly. Flying animals move through the air. Based on this information, can penguins fly?
All flying animals can fly through the air. Penguins are birds that do not fly. Penguins also live in cold environments. Therefore, can a penguin fly through the air?
